name: Otter.ai
description: Leading AI meeting assistant that automatically transcribes, summarizes, and captures action items from meetings across Zoom, Google Meet, and Microsoft Teams. Generates concise meeting summaries with speaker identification and searchable archives. AI chatbot answers questions about past meetings. Custom vocabulary for industry terms. Web, iOS, Android.
shortDesc: AI meeting assistant for transcription and summaries

name: Fireflies.ai
description: AI meeting assistant recording across 100+ platforms including Zoom, Teams, Webex, RingCentral. Searchable transcripts with speaker labels, AI summaries with action items, sentiment analysis, topic tracking, CRM integration with Salesforce and HubSpot. Custom vocabulary.
shortDesc: AI meeting recorder with conversation intelligence

name: Motion
description: AI productivity app auto-scheduling tasks based on priority and deadlines. Creates optimal daily schedules blocking time for deep work, meetings, and tasks. Project timeline views, auto meeting scheduling, adaptive task prioritization. Calendar integration with Google Calendar and Outlook.
shortDesc: AI productivity app that auto-schedules your day

name: Mem.ai
description: AI knowledge management that organizes information automatically. Surfaces relevant info when needed, connects related notes, suggests tags. Unlike traditional note apps, organizes content for you. Team knowledge sharing, AI assistant answers from knowledge base.
shortDesc: AI knowledge management that organizes itself

name: Taskade
description: AI collaboration workspace combining project management, notes, and task tracking. AI generates task lists, project outlines, automates workflows. Real-time collaboration, mind maps, kanban boards, video chat. Cross-platform web, desktop, mobile.
shortDesc: AI collaboration workspace with task management

name: TLDV AI
description: AI meeting summarizer for Zoom, Google Meet, Teams. Records, transcribes, creates executive summaries with action items. CRM integration for sales, keyword tracking for intelligence, search across all calls. Free tier for limited monthly meetings.

name: Bardeen AI
description: AI workflow automation connecting apps without coding. AI suggests automations based on your patterns. 200+ integrations including Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Slack. Browser extension triggers automations. Pre-built playbooks for common tasks.

name: Fathom AI
description: AI note-taker for video calls recording, transcribing, summarizing meetings. Highlights, action items, shareable clips. No bot joins the call, runs locally for privacy. CRM integration. Generous free tier. Zoom, Meet, Teams.

name: Superhuman AI
description: AI email client for speed with AI compose, smart inbox, instant search. Drafts emails, suggests replies, summarizes threads, prioritizes messages. Keyboard-driven navigation, undo send, read receipts, link tracking. Mac, Windows, iOS, Android.
shortDesc: AI email client for lightning productivity

name: Reclaim AI
description: AI scheduling assistant finding best meeting times, blocking focus time, preventing conflicts. Google Calendar integration. Learns preferences and adjusts dynamically. Protects deep work time. Work pattern analytics.

name: Krisp AI
description: AI noise cancellation removing background noise from calls in real-time. Works with any app at system level. Voice isolation, echo removal. Free daily minutes. Windows, Mac, iOS, Android.
shortDesc: AI noise cancellation for clear calls

name: This AI
description: Personal AI that learns from your documents, notes, conversations. Creates personalized knowledge base, answers referencing your info. Document upload for PDFs, Word, websites. Shareable knowledge, custom training.
shortDesc: Personal AI that learns from your data
